name: maintenance room 1
hints: There is a useful container here. Take it for later.
GET PAIL - the empty plastic pail can be filled with water, which you will need for the mission.
GET PAIL. Fill it with water from the vat in the storage room later. EAST returns to the main corridor.
notes: Maintenance room with the empty plastic pail. Fill it with water from the heavy water vat (storage room 23) - needed to defuse the bomb. EAST returns to the main corridor.
